content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add custom orientation transformer callback to exif_transpose' - will modify src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

ack — I added transform_callback param to exif_transpose (src/PIL/ImageOps.py) that overrides the default orientation->method mapping. Since we each submit independent patch.txt files, should be fine, but flagging in case of a later merge: my changes touch the overloads' signatures and the method-resolution block right before the exif-strip section. Your strip_metadata param sounds independent (post-transpose behavior) so hopefully low overlap.
